examples.title: Switch MAC Learning
examples.description: Demonstrates how switches build MAC address tables
examples.code:
PROCEDURE HandleFrame(frame):
   IF source_mac NOT IN mac_table THEN
       ADD mac_table[source_mac] = incoming_port
   IF dest_mac IN mac_table THEN
       FORWARD frame TO mac_table[dest_mac]
   ELSE:
       FLOOD frame TO ALL ports
examples.explanation: Switches learn device locations by source MAC and selectively forward based on destination MAC
